case_title: MIRANDA DELVIN VS. JPMORGAN CHASE BANK , N.A.

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - SIGNED SERVED OCT-03-2014, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT JPMORGAN CHASE BANK , N.A.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-05-2014 - JUDGMENT.
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF DELVIN, MIRANDA AS TO DEFENDANT JPMORGAN CHASE BANK , N.A.
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT JPMORGAN CHASE BANK , N.A.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DELVIN, MIRANDA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT JPMORGAN CHASE BANK , N.A. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY DELVIN, MIRANDA AS TO DEFENDANT JPMORGAN CHASE BANK , N.A. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-14-2014 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-05-2014 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-05-2014 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS REPRESENTED BY KRISTA N. DYER--BRANCH MANAGER. NO COSTS AWARDED BY COURT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-14-2014 - CONTINUED FOR WITNESS TO DEC-05-2014 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. IT IS REQUESTED BY JUDGE MITCHELL THAT THE BANK TELLER ANTHONY MENJIVAR BE PRESENT AT THE NEXT HEARING DATE. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS REPRESENTED BY ADA DUONG--ASSISTANT MANAGER. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
